changes.what_changed: Auto-update check introduced. Arch now detects newer versions at session start.
changes.old_behavior: No version awareness. Users had no way to know a newer version existed.
changes.new_behavior: Arch checks GitHub releases API at session start and notifies the Project Owner if a newer version is available.
changes.user_impact: No migration required. VERSION file must be present for future checks to work.
changes.user_impact_plain: Nothing breaks. From this version forward, Arch will let you know when updates are available.

arch_opening: I see version {version} of Three Man Team is available. Before we get into today's work, I want to walk you through what changed and what — if anything — you need to do. This will take a few minutes and I will go at whatever pace works for you.
